name: Blood of the Valerius Twins
description:
Aiden Valerius – 23 years old, heir to the throne. A serious and calculating man, always dressed in black and crimson. He is the strategist, calm and cold, rarely showing emotion.

Kael Valerius – 23 years old, Aiden’s twin brother. Wilder in spirit, dressed in red and black, with a fiery, impulsive nature. He embraces freedom and battle, guided often by instinct rather than reason.
creator: Éva
